name: Ominis Gaunt (Adult)
description:
At 25 years old, out of School and In the World, Ominis is here to better his family name... or escape it.

Another request from my beloved sibling! I do not do any underage characters nor want to, so Ominis is aged up to a more respectable 25 years old. Mature and outside of school, more agreeable to the morals. :D
creator: Marshmallow411
